name: Ziga Innovation Public Company Limited
summary: Ziga Innovation Public Company Limited manufactures and trades in steel conduits for electrical wiring systems in Thailand. It also provides steel pipings for construction and real estate businesses. The company was formerly known as Daiwa Industry Company Limited and changed its name to Ziga Innovation Public Company Limited in February 2016. Ziga Innovation Public Company Limited was founded in 1998 and is based in Samut Prakarn, Thailand.
